name: qianxin-fw-secgate3600-v3-6-6
description: OctoBus package for QIANXIN SecGate3600 firewall V3.6.6.0 login, IP blacklist block/unblock/query, and logout APIs.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.name: login
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.description: Login to SecGate3600 and cache token/cookie session state.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.name: block-ip
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.description: Block IPs by adding them to the SecGate3600 address blacklist.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.name: unblock-ip
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.description: Unblock IPs by removing them from the SecGate3600 address blacklist.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.name: query-blacklist
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.description: Query the SecGate3600 address blacklist by IP/MAC search key.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.name: logout
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_V3_6_6.QIANXIN_FW.description: Logout from SecGate3600 and clear cached session state.
